description_long: This armchair features a modern, angular design with a wide, slightly reclined backrest and broad, flat armrests. The upholstery is a plush, velvety fabric with a mottled gray and white pattern, giving it a contemporary and slightly distressed appearance. The seat cushion is thick and appears well-padded, providing comfort and support. The chair is supported by a sleek, gold-colored metal frame that wraps around the base and forms four slender, outward-angled legs. The back of the chair is fully upholstered, maintaining the same textured pattern as the front and sides. The overall aesthetic is both luxurious and urban, suitable for stylish public or private spaces.
description: A modern armchair with plush, mottled gray upholstery and a gold metal frame, featuring broad armrests and a thick seat cushion. Its angular design and luxurious materials make it visually striking and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, thick cushion, and broad armrests with the mottled gray upholstery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the chair's reclined backrest, flat armrest, and the gold metal frame supporting the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully upholstered back with the same mottled pattern and the gold frame detail at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the angular profile, armrest, and the gold metal legs.
attribute_armrest_design: broad, flat, and fully upholstered with the same fabric as the seat
attribute_backrest_style: tall, slightly reclined, angular, and fully upholstered with a smooth surface
attribute_leg_type: slender, outward-angled metal legs with a gold finish
attribute_upholstery_pattern: mottled gray and white velvety fabric
